creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I definitely want to keep the bind[89] ports in the "stable" branches, 
but I do have in mind bind[89]-devel ports for the development versions. 

There are also a couple of things in this port that I disagree with... 
particularly the --enable-threads option, which is notoriously unstable 
on just about every platform BIND has been tested on. Also, I've no plans 
to change sysconfdir to blah/etc/bind9. Users who need multiple versions 
of BIND from ports will need to do some configuration on their own, as 
that sort of installation is more of a "power user" item, and I want 
to keep things in my ports as close to a standard installation as possible. 

In any case, thanks for your hard work, sorry we won't be able to take 
advantage of it, although I will keep this PR in mind when I work on the 
-devel versions.
